perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a man wearing a blue sweatshirt and a plaid flat cap, standing in a crowded indoor exhibition hall; he gestures with his hand and speaks directly to the camera. (2) The scene cuts to a high-performance yellow electric car (Xiaomi SU7 Ultra) being showcased on a platform; the camera pans and zooms to show details of its sleek design, aerodynamic spoiler, and large wheels with yellow brake calipers. (3) Transitions occur between the main character speaking and b-roll footage of internal automotive components (motors and gears) displayed on separate stands. (4) Close-up shots highlight the carbon fiber textures on the car's side mirrors and side skirts. (5) The video concludes with the man returning to the frame, giving a thumbs up and pointing towards the yellow car in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice begins speaking in an energetic and friendly tone with a clear accent. (2) The background music remains constant while the male voice continues to narrate, providing various technical numbers and specifications. (3) Ambient noise of a large crowd and distant muffled speakers from the exhibition hall can be heard beneath the music and narration. (4) The music reaches a slight crescendo and then fades out as the narrator finishes his final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Social media icons and handles for '3C有意思Tim哥' and '3ctim' appear at the top. (2) Decorative Text: Bold captions like '小米SU7 Ultra' and '閃電黃色' appear in large, stylized fonts to highlight the car model and color. (3) Functional Text: Performance statistics such as '0-100km/h 1.98s', '350km/h', and '1548p' appear sequentially, synchronized with the narration to emphasize power. (4) Effect Text: A comparative caption '比我的BMW IX2 高很多' (Much higher than my BMW IX2) appears with a sense of excitement and surprise.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Walkthrough -> Outro with CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (Tim), approximately 10 passers-by and exhibition attendees visible in the background and side shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with glasses, wearing a blue sweatshirt with 'RIOT' text and a colorful plaid flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large, bright convention center with overhead studio lighting, various booths with 'Xiaomi' and 'Lenovo' logos, and a display platform for a yellow car.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Cross-fade between music tracks and voiceover layer

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and promote the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra electric vehicle by highlighting its extreme performance metrics (acceleration, top speed, braking) and advanced technological features (carbon fiber build, motor system). It uses the influencer's enthusiastic persona and a direct comparison to his own luxury vehicle (BMW) to establish credibility and excitement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a detailed, positive review of a specific new product (Xiaomi car) at an official event, using on-screen technical specifications often provided by brands.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Opening greeting '大家好我是Tim哥', high-energy delivery, and consistent use of variety-show style text highlights.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a tech-savvy audience interested in EV performance and the expansion of tech brands like Xiaomi into the automotive sector.
